channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cripps’ late goal seals Carlton upset over Geelong in MCG thriller
item.description: Carlton have produced a stirring upset over Geelong, holding on for a four-point victory in a high-quality AFL clash at the MCG, with captain Patrick Cripps delivering the decisive moment late in the ...

item.title: Kenyan authorities arrest eight students after deadly boarding school fire kills 16 and injures 79
item.description: Kenyan authorities have arrested eight students suspected of involvement in a fatal arson attack at a girls’ boarding school that left 16 students dead and 79 others injured. The fire broke out in the...

item.title: Ishaq Dar Meets Marco Rubio to Discuss Bilateral Relations and Regional Peace
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar visited Washington on May 29, 2026, where he met with US Secretary of State and National Security Adviser Marco Rubio. The meeting, which included ...

item.title: Sen. Mike Lee Faces Criticism for Accusing Texas Democratic Candidate of Child Sacrifice
item.description: Senator Mike Lee, a Republican from Utah and chair of the Senate Energy and Natural Resources Committee, faced widespread criticism after making inflammatory claims against James Talarico, the Democra...

item.title: Tanzania aims to become global graphite production hub amid rising EV demand
item.description: Tanzania is making strong plans to position itself as one of the leading global producers of graphite, a key mineral used in electric vehicle batteries and various industrial applications. The country...

item.title: Becky Hill criticises Jack Whitehall’s class-related BRIT Awards joke and discusses working-class themes in new album
item.description: Singer Becky Hill has revisited the controversy surrounding comedian Jack Whitehall’s remarks at the 2025 BRIT Awards, where he referred to her as ‘Wetherspoons Whitney’ and mocked her Midlands accent...

item.title: Former DPWH Secretary Manuel Bonoan posts bail for graft case linked to flood control projects
item.description: Former Public Works Secretary Manuel Bonoan has posted a P90,000 bail at the Sandiganbayan Second Division on Friday to temporarily secure his freedom while facing a graft charge. The case involves al...

item.title: Rescue underway after villagers trapped in flooded Laos cave; first survivor brought out safely
item.description: Rescue teams in Laos have successfully evacuated the first of five villagers who were trapped inside a flooded cave system for more than a week following heavy rain and flash flooding. The operation, ...

item.title: How to Make a Classic Paloma Cocktail for Any Occasion
item.description: The Paloma cocktail, renowned for its light, citrusy, and crisp flavour, is traditionally associated with summer but can be savoured year-round, especially to mark World Paloma Day. Although this cele...

item.title: Convicted murderer displayed weapon obsession years prior to killing university student
item.description: Vikrum Digwa, 23, was found guilty of murdering 18-year-old Henry Nowak in Southampton city centre last December, stabbing him six times with a ceremonial Sikh blade. Mr Nowak, a first-year finance st...

item.title: Robert Reich criticizes DOJ investigation into E. Jean Carroll as political retaliation by Trump
item.description: In this opinion article, former U.S. Labor Secretary Robert Reich argues that the Justice Department under President Donald Trump has dangerously escalated its alleged use of federal power for persona...

item.title: Manitoba passes bill eliminating sales tax on certain foods starting July 1
item.description: After intense and prolonged debate in the Manitoba legislature, the provincial budget bill, which includes a tax reduction on selected foods, passed early Friday morning. The new legislation removes t...

item.title: Kenya seeks partnership with Portugal to expand irrigation and strengthen food security
item.description: Kenya is actively pursuing a strategic partnership with Portugal aimed at expanding irrigation infrastructure and improving food security across the country. The discussions were held between the Stat...

item.title: Ngorongoro Crater named Tripadvisor Best of the Best and top-rated attraction in Africa for 2026
item.description: Ngorongoro Crater in Tanzania has received major international recognition after being named a Tripadvisor Traveller’s Choice – Best of the Best Award winner for 2026, confirming its status as one of ...

item.title: NDC dismisses fake endorsement lists, cautions members on internal election process
item.description: The Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) has publicly denied reports of any authorised endorsement lists circulating within the party, saying such documents are fake and misleading. According to the part...

item.title: Parliamentary panel likely to examine TMC MP Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar’s complaint against Kalyan Banerjee over alleged verbal abuse
item.description: A complaint filed by Trinamool Congress (TMC) MP Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar against fellow party MP Kalyan Banerjee over alleged abusive and misogynistic remarks is likely to be referred to a parliamentary...

item.title: Analyst urges restraint as leaders politicise Utumishi Girls fire tragedy
item.description: Political analyst and communication strategist Advice Mundalo has criticised the growing tendency among Kenyan political actors to politicise national tragedies, following the Utumishi Girls Academy f...

item.title: Serengeti Boys Qualify for FIFA U17 World Cup, Wenger Applauds Youth Team
item.description: Legendary football coach Arsène Wenger has congratulated Tanzania’s Under-17 team, the Serengeti Boys, after they made history by qualifying for the FIFA U17 World Cup in Qatar. Wenger, who is now FIF...

item.title: Laikipia County Leaders Oppose Proposed Ebola Quarantine Facility Over Safety and Consultation Concerns
item.description: Laikipia county leaders have strongly opposed plans to set up a US-requested Ebola quarantine and treatment centre within the county. Governor Joshua Wakahora Irungu stated that the facility was propo...

item.title: Lessons from the Netherlands on reducing youth unemployment in the UK
item.description: The article examines how the Netherlands has achieved one of the lowest rates of young people not in education, employment or training (NEET) in Europe, and what lessons the United Kingdom could draw ...
